message.content:
Build ALL the parent interface screens and remaining student screens for the Axiom app. Write files at /home/claude/projects/axiom/src/app/.

All screens use:
```typescript
import { useThemeStore } from '@/stores/themeStore';
const { colors } = useThemeStore();
```

Colors: background, surface, card, primary (#D4AF37), primaryMuted, text, textSecondary, border, success, warning, error, inputBg.

## PARENT SCREENS

### 1. src/app/(parent)/_layout.tsx
Simple Stack layout, no header:
```typescript
import { Stack } from 'expo-router';
import { useThemeStore } from '@/stores/themeStore';
export default function ParentLayout() {
  const { colors } = useThemeStore();
  return <Stack screenOptions={{ headerShown: false, contentStyle: { backgroundColor: colors.background }, animation: 'slide_from_right' }} />;
}
```

### 2. src/app/(parent)/(tabs)/_layout.tsx
Bottom tabs for parent: Home, Chat, Profile. Same styling pattern as student tabs but use Ionicons: "people" for Home, "chatbubbles" for Chat, "person" for Profile.

### 3. src/app/(parent)/(tabs)/home.tsx — Parent Dashboard
- SafeAreaView with scroll
- Title: "Parent Dashboard"
- Cards for each linked child:
  - Child name + avatar (initials in gold circle)
  - "Study hours this week: 12h" 
  - Progress bar showing overall progress (simple View with width %)
  - "Last active: 2 hours ago"
  - Status badge: "On Track" (green) or "Needs Attention" (orange)
- Tap card → router.push('/(parent)/child/1')
- Use placeholder data: 1-2 children
- "Link Child" button at bottom: show a simple TextInput for invite code + "Link" button
  - On link: query students table by invite_code, create parent_student_link

### 4. src/app/(parent)/(tabs)/chat.tsx — Parent AI Assistant
- Full chat interface (similar to student chat but with parent system prompt context)
- Header: "Parent Advisor"
- Same chat bubble UI as student
- Placeholder messages showing parent-AI interaction examples
- Actually reuse the same pattern: TextInput + send button, messages list
- For now, just show a basic chat UI with placeholder data:
  - AI: "Hello! I'm your parenting advisor. I can help you understand your child's study progress, suggest schedules, and provide advice on exam stress management."
  - Show input bar

### 5. src/app/(parent)/(tabs)/profile.tsx — Parent Profile
- Avatar with initials
- Name, email
- "Linked Children" list
- Theme toggle (dark/light)
- Sign Out button

### 6. src/app/(parent)/child/[id].tsx — Detailed Child View
- Back button header: "Child Progress"
- Child name + exam info
- Stats cards row: "Study Hours" / "Chapters Done" / "Quiz Avg"
- Weekly study hours bar chart (simple custom bars using View components, not a library — just colored rectangles for each day Mon-Sun)
- Subject breakdown: horizontal bars showing time per subject (Physics, Chemistry, Math, Biology)
- "Chapters Completed This Week" list
- AI Summary card: "Your child studied 8.5 hours this week, focusing on Physics Mechanics. They're on track for their JEE preparation."
- All placeholder data

## REMAINING STUDENT SCREENS

### 7. src/app/(student)/notes/[id].tsx — Note Detail
- Header with back button, note title, edit button
- Subject + chapter badges
- Source badge: "Chat Export" / "Video Summary" / "Manual"
- Note content rendered as formatted text (preserve newlines, detect headers with #, bold with **, etc — simple regex replacements)
- "Delete Note" button at bottom
- Use placeholder data

### 8. src/app/(student)/notes/create.tsx — Create Note
- Header: "New Note" with Save button
- Title input
- Subject picker (horizontal chips: Physics, Chemistry, Math, Biology, Other)
- Chapter input
- Large multiline TextInput for content (markdown-style)
- "Save" creates note in Supabase and navigates back

### 9. src/app/(student)/videos/index.tsx — Video Hub
- Header: "Video Hub"
- Search bar with search icon
- "Peer Picks" section (horizontal scroll of video cards — placeholder)
- Search results section (vertical list of video cards)
- Each video card: thumbnail placeholder (gray rect with play icon), title, channel, duration
- Tap → router.push('/(student)/videos/[videoId]')
- Placeholder data: 5-6 sample videos about physics/chemistry topics

### 10. src/app/(student)/videos/[id].tsx — Video Detail + Summary
- Back button header
- YouTube player placeholder (large dark rect with play button — we'll add the actual player later)
- Below: video title, channel name
- "Summarize" button (gold, prominent)
- Summary section (initially hidden, shows after "summarize"):
  - Key Timestamps list
  - Main Concepts bullets
  - Key Takeaways
  - "Save as Notes" button
- Use placeholder summary data

### 11. src/app/(student)/flashcards/index.tsx — Flashcard Decks
- Header: "Flashcards"
- Deck cards in a list:
  - Subject name (e.g., "Physics — Mechanics")
  - "12 cards · 5 due today"
  - Progress bar
- Tap → router.push('/(student)/flashcards/study')
- "Create Deck" FAB
- Placeholder: 3-4 decks

### 12. src/app/(student)/flashcards/study.tsx — Study Session
- Back button header: "Study Session"
- Large centered flashcard:
  - Shows front text
  - Tap to flip (simple state toggle showing back text)
  - The card should have a subtle gold border
- Below card: rating buttons — "Again" (red), "Hard" (orange), "Good" (green), "Easy" (gold)
- Progress: "Card 3 of 12"
- When all cards done: "Session Complete!" with stats
- Placeholder data: 5 sample flashcards about physics

### 13. src/app/(student)/goals/index.tsx — Goals & Progress
- Header: "My Goals"
- Current goal card: exam name, target date, countdown ("45 days left")
- Progress percentage in a large circle (just text for now)
- Weekly stats: study hours per day (simple bar chart with View rectangles)
- Subject progress bars: Physics 65%, Chemistry 40%, Math 72%, Biology 55%
- "Update Goal" button
- Placeholder data

Create ALL files. Make them visually consistent with the AMOLED gold theme. Use StyleSheet.create. Use Ionicons for icons. Use placeholder/mock data throughout.

content.text:
All 13 screens have been created. Here is a summary of the files written:

**Parent Screens:**
- `/home/claude/projects/axiom/src/app/(parent)/_layout.tsx` — Stack layout with no header
- `/home/claude/projects/axiom/src/app/(parent)/(tabs)/_layout.tsx` — Bottom tabs (Home, Chat, Profile) with Ionicons
- `/home/claude/projects/axiom/src/app/(parent)/(tabs)/home.tsx` — Parent dashboard with child cards, progress bars, status badges, and link-child flow
- `/home/claude/projects/axiom/src/app/(parent)/(tabs)/chat.tsx` — Parent AI advisor chat interface with placeholder messages
- `/home/claude/projects/axiom/src/app/(parent)/(tabs)/profile.tsx` — Profile with avatar, linked children list, theme toggle, sign out
- `/home/claude/projects/axiom/src/app/(parent)/child/[id].tsx` — Detailed child view with stats cards, weekly bar chart, subject breakdown, chapters list, AI summary

**Student Screens:**
- `/home/claude/projects/axiom/src/app/(student)/notes/[id].tsx` — Note detail with formatted text rendering, subject/chapter badges, source badge, delete button
- `/home/claude/projects/axiom/src/app/(student)/notes/create.tsx` — Create note with title input, subject chips, chapter input, multiline content
- `/home/claude/projects/axiom/src/app/(student)/videos/index.tsx` — Video hub with search bar, peer picks horizontal scroll, video card list
- `/home/claude/projects/axiom/src/app/(student)/videos/[id].tsx` — Video detail with player placeholder, summarize button, expandable AI summary
- `/home/claude/projects/axiom/src/app/(student)/flashcards/index.tsx` — Flashcard decks list with progress bars and Create Deck FAB
- `/home/claude/projects/axiom/src/app/(student)/flashcards/study.tsx` — Study session with flip-to-reveal card, rating buttons, session complete stats
- `/home/claude/projects/axiom/src/app/(student)/goals/index.tsx` — Goals with countdown, progress circle, weekly bar chart, subject progress bars

All screens use `useThemeStore` for colors, `StyleSheet.create` for styles, Ionicons for icons, and placeholder/mock data throughout. They follow the AMOLED gold theme with consistent styling patterns.
